source_repos.role: source-contract, ledger mechanics, runtime candidate guardrails, and state manifest owner
source_repos.authority_boundary: platform mechanics and source routing only; not runtime truth, signal truth, public proof, or website authority
detection source truth only; not validation, runtime, signal, proof, or public-safe truth

source_repos.role: controlled validation and activity ledger owner
source_repos.authority_boundary: controlled validation truth only; not runtime truth, signal truth, proof authority, or public-safe truth

source_repos.role: proof record, blocked claim, proof ceiling, and public-safe boundary owner
source_repos.authority_boundary: proof source records and proof boundaries only; website rendering does not create proof
presentation only; never source authority for status, proof, runtime, signal, public-safe, or closure fields

source_repos.role: Hoxline product and Gauntlet field owner
source_repos.authority_boundary: product/Gauntlet source truth only when a safe source artifact is captured; no value is captured in this platform contract

public_rendering_contract.no_proof_promotion_statement: This contract does not promote proof. The website may render only bounded source-contract fields and must not treat rendering as proof, runtime truth, signal truth, public-safe status, production readiness, customer deployment, SOCaaS deployment, disposition approval, final authorization, or case closure.

lifetime_governed_cases.freshness_policy: Refresh from the lifetime state manifest within freshness_window_days; stale render must show source-stale status.

lifetime_ledger_events.freshness_policy: Refresh from the lifetime state manifest within freshness_window_days; stale render must show source-stale status.

append_ready_runtime_candidates.freshness_policy: Refresh from the normalizer plan sample only as candidate truth; stale render must preserve append approval required status.

detection_activity_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from validation-owned activity source route; stale render must not convert activity into governed cases.

controlled_validation_fire_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from validation-owned activity source route; stale render must not imply live signal observation.

validation_case_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from validation-owned activity source route; stale render must remain validation volume only.

proof_record_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from proof-owned source route; stale render must not imply proof promotion.

blocked_claim_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from proof-owned reviewer map route; stale render must preserve blocked-claim boundary.

public_safe_count.freshness_policy: Remain 0 unless a proof-owned public-safe source explicitly changes it and this contract is updated.

closed_case_count.freshness_policy: Refresh from the lifetime state manifest; stale render must not imply case closure.

proof_ceiling.freshness_policy: Remain at the proof ceiling unless proof-owned records explicitly authorize a narrower or newer ceiling and this contract is updated.

public_safe_state.freshness_policy: Remain NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE unless a proof-owned public-safe source explicitly changes it and this contract is updated.

source_repos.freshness_policy: Refresh when the contract source repo list changes.

source_paths.freshness_policy: Refresh when the contract source path list changes.

generated_at.freshness_policy: Generated status v1 must update this timestamp when it regenerates from source artifacts.

freshness_window_days.freshness_policy: Generated status v1 must mark any source older than this window as stale unless the field is explicitly unknown.

reviewer_actions_source_routes.freshness_policy: Refresh when reviewer routes or verifier commands change.

detection_source_truth.freshness_policy: Do not render until generated-status v1 captures a bounded detections-owned value.

hoxline_product_status.freshness_policy: Do not render from platform or website-only data; capture only from a safe Hoxline-owned source route.

hoxline_gauntlet_status.freshness_policy: Do not render from platform or website-only data; capture only from a safe Hoxline-owned Gauntlet source route.

freshness_policy.generated_status_behavior: Generated public status v1 must read source artifacts, compare source timestamps or contract generated_at against freshness_window_days, and mark stale fields instead of inventing replacements.
freshness_policy.stale_render_rule: A stale field may render only with explicit stale status and original source route; stale values must not become proof, public-safe, runtime, signal, production, customer, SOCaaS, disposition, authorization, or closure claims.
freshness_policy.unknown_rule: If a source artifact or safe extraction route is missing, generated-status v1 must emit UNKNOWN_SOURCE_NOT_CAPTURED.

proof_ceiling_policy.blocked_claim_boundary: Proof, public-safe, runtime, signal, production, customer, SOCaaS, disposition, authorization, and closure claims remain blocked unless a proof-owned source explicitly authorizes them and this platform contract is updated.

extractor_should: Read only the declared source_paths for renderable fields.
Preserve owner_repo per field in generated output.
Emit UNKNOWN_SOURCE_NOT_CAPTURED when a source route is absent, unsafe, or not represented in this contract.
Render stale values only with explicit stale status.
Fail closed if a website-only file attempts to source status, proof, runtime, signal, public-safe, production, customer, SOCaaS, disposition, authorization, or closure fields.
extractor_must_not: Read website-only dashboard values as authority.
Do not promote proof or public-safe status from presentation text.
